meaning: adj.不快乐的,沉闷的,忧郁的
examples: His mirthless smile made all of us uncomfortable.
Mirthless My daily routine starts with a cup of coffee .
"Plus a million supporters," he adds, with a mirthless laugh.
Working from a script by Michael Gerbosi, Schrader jumps through vignettes of mirthless fun and bland debauchery.
It all fits a regrettably mirthless trend.
